arabic_text:
نسبت اعلی
نسبت ادنی
علی
محبت
محمد
امام
english_text:
Higher relation
Lower relation
Ali
Love
Muhammad
Imam
alt_text: A two-panel diagram showing relationships between figures (labeled Ali, Muhammad, Love) and a cluster of Imam-labeled pink circles on the right. Each panel is divided into higher (نسبت اعلی) and lower (نسبت ادنی) relations.
notes: Esoteric Ismaili teaching diagram about higher/lower spiritual relationships in the hierarchy of imams and wasis. Small labels difficult to read at native resolution; Phase 0b refinement may need to consult the original chapter text for exact term mapping.
